description: Tests local models on JSON structure discipline, source grounding, response type routing, and catalog discipline. Run against llama.cpp OpenAI-compatible endpoint with llm_benchmark_runner.py.
notes: expected_type: the correct response type the model should return.
expected_source_ids: at least one of these should appear in order items (if type=order).
must_not_hallucinate: source_ids that should never appear (not in catalog or wrong scope).
clarify_ok: if true, clarify is also acceptable alongside the primary expected_type.

cases.query: Show earthquakes in Japan since 2015
cases.notes: Simplest possible order. Baseline pass for any instruction-following model.

cases.query: Population density in California
cases.notes: USA-specific source. Should use census not worldpop.

cases.query: Show CO2 emissions for Europe 2022
cases.notes: Global source, explicit year. Clean JSON discipline test.

cases.query: Wildfires in California last year
cases.notes: Relative time reference. Model should resolve to a reasonable year.

cases.query: Show hurricanes in the Gulf of Mexico since 2000
cases.notes: Regional qualifier on a global source.

cases.query: Show volcanoes that erupted in the last decade
cases.notes: Relative time window, global scope.

cases.query: Tsunami events in the Pacific since 1990
cases.notes: Simple events query. Tests clean JSON output.

cases.query: Show tornado events in Texas
cases.notes: State-level disaster query.

cases.query: Show flood events globally since 2000
cases.notes: Global scope, explicit time window.

cases.query: Landslides in Southeast Asia
cases.notes: Less common disaster type. Tests catalog recall.

cases.query: Show GDP data for the G20
cases.notes: Economic data, regional group. Either owid or imf is acceptable.

cases.query: Show population data for Africa
cases.notes: Continent scope, global population source.

cases.query: Earthquakes in Chile between 2010 and 2020
cases.notes: Explicit year range. Model should set year_start and year_end.

cases.query: Show me wildfire data for Australia
cases.notes: Country scope on a global source.

cases.query: Show hurricane tracks for the Atlantic in 2005
cases.notes: Specific basin + year. Tests region and year field assignment.

cases.query: Show me CO2 emissions per capita for the Nordic countries
cases.notes: Sub-region grouping. Model must know nordic is a valid region.

cases.query: Show earthquakes above magnitude 6 globally in 2023
cases.notes: Filter condition in natural language. Tests whether model encodes filter intent.

cases.query: Volcano eruptions in Indonesia over the last 50 years
cases.notes: Country + long relative time window.

cases.query: Show BRICS countries CO2 emissions trend from 2000 to 2022
cases.notes: Political grouping + explicit year range.

cases.query: Show tornadoes in the US midwest in 2020
cases.notes: Sub-national regional reference. Model may need to map midwest to a region or clarify.

cases.query: Show flood risk scores for US counties
cases.notes: FEMA NRI is the risk score source, not the global floods event source. Key grounding test.

cases.query: Australian population by state
cases.notes: AUS-specific source. Should not use US census or global worldpop.

cases.query: Show poverty rates by country
cases.notes: SDG Goal 1 is poverty. Tests goal-to-source mapping.

cases.query: CO2 emissions per capita for BRICS countries
cases.notes: Regional grouping + specific metric.

cases.query: Exchange rate for Japanese yen against USD over the last decade
cases.notes: FX source. Tests whether model picks fx_usd_historical not an economic indicator.

cases.query: Show me FEMA risk index for Florida counties
cases.notes: Named source in query. Should map to fema_nri not disaster event sources.

cases.query: Compare earthquake frequency and population density in Japan
cases.notes: Multi-source order. Both sources should appear in items.

cases.query: Show nuclear power plant locations in Europe
cases.notes: Not in catalog. Should respond with chat, not hallucinate a source_id.

cases.query: Military spending as percentage of GDP by country
cases.notes: Not in catalog. High hallucination risk - well-trained models know this data exists elsewhere.

cases.query: Show UN SDG clean water access by country
cases.notes: SDG Goal 6 is clean water. Tests goal-to-source_id mapping.

cases.query: Show balance of payments data for G20 countries
cases.notes: IMF BOP source. Tests economic source selection.

cases.query: Show me hunger and food insecurity by country
cases.notes: SDG Goal 2 is zero hunger. Tests SDG vocabulary mapping without hallucinating FAO.

cases.query: Show health outcomes by country
cases.notes: SDG Goal 3 is health. Broad query - clarify acceptable but should not hallucinate WHO source.

cases.query: Show energy access rates globally
cases.notes: SDG Goal 7 is energy. Tests SDG mapping vs hallucinating energy agency sources.

cases.query: Show unemployment rates for Europe
cases.notes: SDG Goal 8 covers decent work and economic growth. Tests SDG mapping vs hallucinating Eurostat.

cases.query: Turkish lira depreciation against USD over the last 5 years
cases.notes: Specific currency + time window. Tests FX source recall with non-English currency name.

cases.query: Show Argentine peso exchange rate year by year since 2010
cases.notes: Granular FX request. Tests year_start / year_end assignment.

cases.query: Show population data for counties in Texas
cases.notes: County-level USA query. Should use census not worldpop.

cases.query: Show wildfire risk scores for California counties
cases.notes: Risk scores are fema_nri, not wildfire events. Tests risk vs events distinction for USA.

cases.query: Show me climate action metrics by country
cases.notes: SDG Goal 13 is climate action. owid_co2 also acceptable. Tests SDG climate mapping.

cases.query: Show me IMF data for South America
cases.notes: Named source in query mapped to correct source_id. Tests imf -> imf_bop mapping.

cases.query: Show earthquake exposure for population centers in Turkey
cases.notes: Multi-source join. Disaster + population. Both should appear in order items.

cases.query: Compare GDP per capita across the EU
cases.notes: Economic query on political grouping. Either owid or imf acceptable, not hallucinated sources.

cases.query: Show me all available data for New Zealand
cases.notes: Broad all-data request for a country with no specific source. Should use global sources, not hallucinate NZ-specific ones.

cases.query: Show storm surge risk for Gulf Coast counties
cases.notes: Specific risk type for US counties. fema_nri is the right source, not a hallucinated NOAA coastal risk source.

cases.query: Show me tsunami damage and casualties historically
cases.notes: Casualty/damage framing should still map to tsunamis source.

cases.query: Show me landslide fatalities by region
cases.notes: Fatality framing. Should map to landslides, not hallucinate EM-DAT or global disaster death databases.

cases.query: Show annual wildfire burned area for Canada
cases.notes: Canada wildfire query. Should use global wildfires source, not hallucinate a Canada-specific fire agency.

cases.query: Show me population of New South Wales
cases.notes: Australia state query. Must use abs_population, not worldpop or USA census.

cases.query: Show flood events in Bangladesh since 1985
cases.notes: Non-USA flood query. Should use global floods, never fema_nri which is USA-only.

cases.query: Show me data for Georgia
cases.notes: Classic ambiguity: Georgia the US state vs Georgia the country.

cases.query: Navigate to Japan
cases.notes: Pure navigation request with no data keywords. Should not produce an order.

cases.query: Zoom to California
cases.notes: Explicit zoom verb. Should return navigate not order.

cases.query: Show me data
cases.notes: Maximally vague. Should always clarify, never hallucinate an order.

cases.query: Turn on the earthquake overlay
cases.notes: Explicit overlay toggle. Should not produce a data order.

cases.query: Show me Washington earthquake risk
cases.notes: Washington state vs Washington DC ambiguity.

cases.query: Disable the wildfire overlay
cases.notes: Overlay disable (enabled=false). Distinct from overlay enable.

cases.query: What is happening right now
cases.notes: No location, no data type. Should clarify both, not guess.

cases.query: What earthquake data do you have?
cases.notes: Informational question about coverage. Should describe the source, not execute an order.

cases.query: Compare population growth vs CO2 emissions for the top 10 economies since 2000
cases.notes: Complex multi-source order. Tests whether model builds a two-item order.

cases.query: Show me Guinea
cases.notes: Three Guineas exist: Guinea, Guinea-Bissau, Equatorial Guinea. Should disambiguate.

cases.query: Go to Turkey
cases.notes: Navigate verb. Should zoom to Turkey, not load data about Turkey.

cases.query: Add Canada to the map
cases.notes: Incremental order. Ambiguous metric - may need clarification or default to population.

cases.query: Remove the earthquake layer
cases.notes: Overlay disable using 'remove' vocabulary. Should map to overlay_toggle enabled=false.

cases.query: Show me the Congo
cases.notes: Congo Republic vs Democratic Republic of Congo. Should disambiguate.

cases.query: Filter earthquakes to magnitude 7 and above
cases.notes: Filter update on existing overlay. Should encode magnitude filter in order.

cases.query: Show me everything about Indonesia
cases.notes: Too broad to execute. Should ask which data type or domain.

cases.query: What do you have for climate data?
cases.notes: Informational discovery question. Should describe available climate sources, not execute.

cases.query: Enable hurricanes and disable wildfires
cases.notes: Two overlay actions in one query. Should produce overlay_toggle responses.

cases.query: Center the map on Lagos Nigeria
cases.notes: City-level navigation. Should navigate, not order data.

cases.query: Show me data for the Middle East
cases.notes: Region with no metric specified. Should clarify what data type.

cases.query: Show recent seismic activity in New Zealand
cases.notes: Seismic is earthquake vocabulary. Tests synonym mapping to correct source.

cases.query: Fly to the Sahara
cases.notes: Fly is navigate vocabulary. Geographic feature, not a country.

cases.query: Show me tropical storm data for Southeast Asia
cases.notes: Tropical storms are hurricanes in the catalog. Tests vocabulary synonym handling.

cases.query: I want to see the Philippines
cases.notes: Ambiguous intent - could be navigate or data. Navigate or clarify both acceptable.

cases.query: Show typhoon tracks near the Philippines since 2010
cases.notes: Typhoons are hurricanes in IBTrACS. Tests regional storm vocabulary mapping.

cases.query: What sources do you have?
cases.notes: Top-level catalog discovery question. Should summarize available sources in chat.

cases.query: Show me the worst affected areas from the 2004 Indian Ocean tsunami
cases.notes: Named historical event. Should map to tsunamis source with year=2004.

cases.query: Turn off all overlays
cases.notes: Bulk overlay disable. Tests overlay_toggle with broad disable intent.

cases.query: Show me drought conditions in East Africa
cases.notes: Drought data is not in this catalog. Should clarify or chat, not hallucinate a drought index source.

cases.query: Show me UK population broken down by county
cases.notes: UK county data not in catalog. Should clarify or offer global alternative, never hallucinate a UK source.

cases.query: Show population data for Ontario Canada
cases.notes: No Canada-specific source. Should fall back to worldpop not hallucinate a Canada source.

cases.query: Show me FEMA flood zone maps for Houston
cases.notes: FEMA flood zone maps are not fema_nri. Should use NRI or clarify, not hallucinate a flood zones source.

cases.query: Show me census data for Australia
cases.notes: Australian census is abs_population, not the USA census source. Scope discipline.

cases.query: Show global internet access rates by country
cases.notes: Not in catalog. Should acknowledge unavailability rather than hallucinating a source.

cases.query: Show me COVID-19 case counts by country
cases.notes: COVID data not in catalog. High hallucination risk - models know this data exists in OWID.

cases.query: Show me deforestation rates in the Amazon
cases.notes: Not in catalog. Strong hallucination risk for Brazilian deforestation monitoring sources.

cases.query: Show crime rates by US state
cases.notes: Crime data not in catalog. Should decline gracefully.

cases.query: Show election results by district in France
cases.notes: Political/election data not in catalog.

cases.query: Show me property prices in London
cases.notes: Real estate data not in catalog. Should decline.

cases.query: Show air quality index for cities in China
cases.notes: Air quality not in catalog. Should acknowledge and not hallucinate an AQI source.

cases.query: Show me sea level rise measurements by coastline
cases.notes: Sea level data not in catalog. Tests whether model hallucinates NOAA or Copernicus sources.

cases.query: Show renewable energy capacity by country
cases.notes: SDG 7 touches energy access but not capacity specifically. Should use SDG 7 or clarify, not hallucinate IRENA.

cases.query: Show me German population by municipality
cases.notes: Municipality level for Germany not in catalog. worldpop covers country level at best. Should clarify or use worldpop.

cases.query: Show me traffic accident deaths by country
cases.notes: Road safety data not in catalog.

cases.query: Show me hospital locations in Brazil
cases.notes: Health facility location data not in catalog.

cases.query: Show FEMA data for Texas
cases.notes: Named FEMA source in query. Should resolve to fema_nri. FEMA is USA-only so Texas is in scope.

cases.query: Show me FEMA data for Mexico
cases.notes: FEMA is USA-only. Mexico query for FEMA should clarify or decline, never use fema_nri for a non-USA country.

cases.query: Show me census data for India
cases.notes: India census not in catalog. Should use worldpop as fallback, never the USA census source.

cases.query: Show me ABS data for Queensland
cases.notes: ABS is the Australian Bureau of Statistics - maps to abs_population. Queensland is an Australian state.
